title: Karur records high summer temperature
summary: Karur continues to experience temperatures above 40°C, with heatwave conditions intensifying across interior Tamil Nadu districts, officials warn residents to take precautions.

title: IMD warns of hotter days ahead
summary: Meteorological department forecasts rising temperatures in early May, with Karur likely to face continued heatwave days and minimal rainfall relief.

title: Post-election political activity continues
summary: Political parties in Karur continue internal discussions and voter feedback reviews following recently concluded assembly election polling in the region.

title: Water supply monitored amid summer demand
summary: Municipal authorities intensify monitoring of drinking water supply as demand rises sharply due to extreme heat conditions across Karur.

title: Heat-related illness cases increase
summary: Local hospitals report a rise in dehydration and heat exhaustion cases as temperatures remain above seasonal averages in Karur district.

title: Traffic slows during peak heat hours
summary: Traffic movement across Karur town slows during midday hours as commuters avoid travel under extreme summer heat conditions.

title: Farmers worry over water scarcity
summary: Farmers in Karur express concerns over irrigation shortages as rising temperatures increase water demand for standing crops.

title: Textile sector sees steady activity
summary: Karur’s textile and home furnishing units continue stable operations, with summer export orders maintaining moderate business momentum.

title: Public avoids outdoor gatherings
summary: Residents limit outdoor activities during daytime hours due to intense heat, impacting local markets and public spaces attendance.

title: Road repair works progress slowly
summary: Ongoing road repair works in parts of Karur face delays as high temperatures affect labor conditions and work schedules.

title: Schools adjust timings due to heat
summary: Several schools in Karur adjust class timings and reduce outdoor activities to protect students from heat exposure.

title: Water bodies show declining levels
summary: Local lakes and reservoirs in Karur report reduced water levels as evaporation increases under prolonged summer heat conditions.

title: Municipality intensifies tanker services
summary: Authorities deploy additional water tankers to meet increased demand in residential areas facing supply shortages.

title: Doctors advise hydration measures
summary: Health officials urge residents to stay hydrated, avoid direct sunlight, and monitor symptoms of heatstroke during ongoing heatwave.

title: Vegetable prices fluctuate locally
summary: Vegetable prices in Karur markets show minor fluctuations due to supply variations caused by heat-affected agricultural production.

title: Bus services operate normally
summary: Public transport services continue without disruption, though passenger numbers drop during peak afternoon heat hours.

title: Parks see reduced visitor numbers
summary: Public parks in Karur witness fewer visitors during daytime, with most footfall shifting to early morning and evening hours.

title: Small businesses adapt working hours
summary: Local traders adjust shop timings to early mornings and late evenings to cope with reduced daytime customer activity.

title: Police increase patrols in town
summary: Police conduct regular patrols in commercial areas to ensure safety as reduced foot traffic alters usual activity patterns.

title: Waste collection schedules maintained
summary: Municipal workers continue regular waste collection despite extreme heat, with modified working hours to ensure worker safety.

title: Power demand rises across district
summary: Electricity consumption increases significantly as residents rely heavily on cooling appliances amid ongoing heatwave conditions.

title: Authorities monitor power supply stability
summary: Officials closely monitor power infrastructure to prevent outages as electricity demand peaks during high-temperature periods.

title: Livestock affected by heat stress
summary: Farmers report stress among livestock due to extreme temperatures, prompting increased water and shelter arrangements.

title: Community water points crowded
summary: Public drinking water points witness increased usage as residents seek relief from heat and limited household supply.

title: Pharmacies report higher ORS sales
summary: Demand for oral rehydration solutions and cooling products rises sharply across medical stores in Karur.

title: Cooling appliance sales increase
summary: Retailers report strong sales of fans, air coolers, and air conditioners amid sustained high temperatures.

title: Exams continue under heat precautions
summary: Schools and colleges implement heat safety measures as ongoing examinations take place during peak summer conditions.

title: Dust levels rise in dry conditions
summary: Dry weather and reduced vegetation contribute to increased dust levels across urban and rural areas in Karur.

title: Auto drivers report reduced trips
summary: Auto-rickshaw drivers note fewer daytime trips as residents avoid travel during peak heat hours.

title: Fruit demand surges locally
summary: Sales of watermelon, tender coconut, and citrus fruits increase significantly as residents seek hydration options.

title: Evening markets see higher footfall
summary: Markets experience increased activity during evenings as temperatures drop, attracting more shoppers.

title: Construction activities slow down
summary: Extreme heat conditions reduce construction activity, with workers shifting to early morning shifts.

title: Hospitals extend emergency readiness
summary: Healthcare facilities remain alert for heatstroke emergencies as temperature levels remain consistently high.

title: Public advised to conserve water
summary: Authorities urge residents to use water responsibly to avoid shortages during peak summer demand.

title: Irrigation schedules adjusted
summary: Farmers adjust irrigation timings to early morning and night hours to minimize water loss due to evaporation.

title: Local economy shows steady movement
summary: Despite weather challenges, Karur’s core industries maintain stable operations with moderate trade activity.

title: Residents rely on indoor activities
summary: Indoor recreational activities increase as residents avoid prolonged outdoor exposure during daytime heat.

title: Authorities ensure safety at water points
summary: Officials monitor crowded water distribution points to maintain order and prevent disputes during supply shortages.

title: Highways remain clear during midday
summary: Reduced vehicular movement observed on highways passing through Karur during peak heat hours.

title: Tree shade becomes vital refuge
summary: Residents increasingly gather under shaded areas and roadside trees to escape intense sunlight.

title: Cooling beverages gain popularity
summary: Juice shops and beverage stalls report higher sales as people seek quick relief from heat.

title: Street vendors alter working hours
summary: Street vendors shift operations to evenings due to declining daytime sales caused by extreme temperatures.

title: Officials warn against sun exposure
summary: Health departments advise avoiding direct sun exposure between late morning and afternoon to prevent heat-related illness.

title: Religious places see steady turnout
summary: Temples and places of worship maintain steady visitor numbers, especially during early hours.

title: Tourist activity remains limited
summary: Tourist visits remain low due to extreme heat, with most travelers preferring cooler destinations.

title: Retail footfall declines midday
summary: Retail stores report reduced customer visits during peak afternoon hours amid ongoing heatwave conditions.

title: Water pipeline checks intensified
summary: Municipal teams inspect pipelines to prevent leaks and ensure efficient water distribution during peak demand.

title: Crop yield concerns rise
summary: Farmers anticipate potential crop stress and reduced yields if high temperatures persist into May.

title: Public grievance calls increase
summary: Authorities receive more complaints regarding water shortages and heat-related civic issues across Karur.

title: Light rain unlikely to bring relief
summary: Forecasts suggest minimal rainfall in coming days, offering little respite from prevailing high temperatures in Karur region.
